info.title: happy-recorder
info.description: A cli tool project helps recording happy times and reactions.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Preview changes without actually making them [default: False]

commands.name: mark
commands.description: Add a new happy record to the database.

commands.name: now
commands.description: Mark current time as happy time.

commands.name: time
commands.description: Mark specific time as happy time.

options.name: --time
options.description: Time string about when you triggered.

options.name: --minutes
options.description: How many minutes ago to be marked as happy.

commands.name: get-db-location
commands.description: Get current program's database file location.

commands.name: set-db-location
commands.description: Set current program's database file location.

options.name: --path
options.description: Path of the videos to be parsed.
